# HackXperience 2026

## Event
- Name: HackXperience 2026
- Organizer: SIM IT Club
- Date: 22-23 May 2026
- Venue: SIM, Singapore
- Duration: 24 hours (not overnight)
- Contact: it@mymail.sim.edu.sg
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/simitclub
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sim-information-technology-club/

## Pre-events
- Project Showcase: 15 Apr 2026, 12-4PM, SIM Block B Level 1
- React & Next.js Workshop: 23 & 30 April 2026, SIM Campus

## Past Hackathons
- HackXperience 2025: 90+ participants, 20 projects, SIM Outstanding Event Award Silver
- Omnitool: 95 participants, 20-21 projects
